---
title: "ctdnaTM v0.75.10 — SOW36 analysis starter"
output: html_notebook
---

This is your working Rmd as of v0.75.10, BEFORE the ctdna_prepare()
redesign that didn't pan out. Use this as your starting point.

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE,
                      fig.width = 16, fig.height = 10)
library(tidyverse)
library(haven)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(circlize)
library(fs)

if (!requireNamespace("ctdnaTM", quietly = TRUE)) {
  install.packages("/mnt/code/Hn/lib/ctdnaTM_0.43.8.tar.gz",
                   repos = NULL, type = "source")
}
library(ctdnaTM)
rm(list = ls())
```

### Clinical Data Loading

```{r load_clinical}
ia1_adrs_path <- "/mnt/imported/data/61602_223054_BIOMARK_EXPLORATORY_04_UNB_CX/inputdata/adamdata/adrs.sas7bdat"
ia2_adrs_path <- "/mnt/imported/data/61602_223054_BIOMARK_EXPLORATORY_04_UNB_CX/inputdata/adamdata/ia2/adrs.sas7bdat"
ia1_adtr_path <- "/mnt/imported/data/61602_223054_BIOMARK_EXPLORATORY_04_UNB_CX/inputdata/adamdata/adtr.sas7bdat"
ia2_adtr_path <- "/mnt/imported/data/61602_223054_BIOMARK_EXPLORATORY_04_UNB_CX/inputdata/adamdata/ia2/adtr.sas7bdat"
ia1_adsl_path <- "/mnt/imported/data/61602_223054_BIOMARK_EXPLORATORY_04_UNB_CX/inputdata/adamdata/adsl.sas7bdat"
ia2_adsl_path <- "/mnt/imported/data/61602_223054_BIOMARK_EXPLORATORY_04_UNB_CX/inputdata/adamdata/ia2/adsl.sas7bdat"

ia1_adrs <- if (file.exists(ia1_adrs_path)) read_sas(ia1_adrs_path) else tibble(SUBJID = character())
ia2_adrs <- if (file.exists(ia2_adrs_path)) read_sas(ia2_adrs_path) else tibble(SUBJID = character())
ia1_adtr <- if (file.exists(ia1_adtr_path)) read_sas(ia1_adtr_path) else tibble(SUBJID = character())
ia2_adtr <- if (file.exists(ia2_adtr_path)) read_sas(ia2_adtr_path) else tibble(SUBJID = character())
ia1_adsl <- if (file.exists(ia1_adsl_path)) read_sas(ia1_adsl_path) else tibble(SUBJID = character())
ia2_adsl <- if (file.exists(ia2_adsl_path)) read_sas(ia2_adsl_path) else tibble(SUBJID = character())
```

### Clinical Cohort Filtering

```{r clinical_cohorts}
## Nsq-NSCLC
Nsq_NSCLC_adrs_IA2 <- ia2_adrs %>% filter(PARAM == "Best Confirmed Response by Investigator (RECIST 1.1)",
                                            grepl("NON-SMALL CELL LUNG CANCER", PRTUMTY),
                                            STUDYESC == "Nsq. NSCLC GSK5764227 8 mg/kg") %>%
  mutate(indication_dose = "Nsq_NSCLC_8mg")

## HNSCC
HNSCC_adrs_IA2 <- ia2_adrs %>% filter(PARAM == "Best Confirmed Response by Investigator (RECIST 1.1)",
                                        STUDYESC == "HNSCC GSK5764227 8 mg/kg") %>%
  mutate(indication_dose = "HNSCC_8mg")

## ES-SCLC
ES_SCLC_6mg_adrs_IA1 <- ia1_adrs %>% filter(PARAM == "Best Confirmed Response by Investigator (RECIST 1.1)",
                                              COHORT == "ES-SCLC COHORT",
                                              TRT01A == "GSK227 6 mg/kg Q3W Dose Opt",
                                              MITTFL == "Y") %>%
  mutate(indication_dose = "ES_SCLC_6mg")
ES_SCLC_8mg_adrs_IA1 <- ia1_adrs %>% filter(PARAM == "Best Confirmed Response by Investigator (RECIST 1.1)",
                                              COHORT == "ES-SCLC COHORT",
                                              TRT01A == "GSK227 8 mg/kg Q3W Dose Opt",
                                              MITTFL == "Y") %>%
  mutate(indication_dose = "ES_SCLC_8mg")

## mCRPC
mCRPC_6m_adrs_IA2 <- ia2_adrs %>% filter(PARAM == "Best Confirmed Response by Investigator (Modified RECIST 1.1)",
                                           COHORT == "MCRPC COHORT", MORRSFL == "Y",
                                           TRT01A == "GSK227 6 mg/kg Q3W Dose Opt") %>%
  mutate(indication_dose = "mCRPC_6mg")
mCRPC_8m_adrs_IA2 <- ia2_adrs %>% filter(PARAM == "Best Confirmed Response by Investigator (Modified RECIST 1.1)",
                                           COHORT == "MCRPC COHORT", MORRSFL == "Y",
                                           TRT01A == "GSK227 8 mg/kg Q3W Dose Opt") %>%
  mutate(indication_dose = "mCRPC_8mg")

pan_adrs <- rbind(Nsq_NSCLC_adrs_IA2, HNSCC_adrs_IA2,
                   ES_SCLC_6mg_adrs_IA1, ES_SCLC_8mg_adrs_IA1,
                   mCRPC_6m_adrs_IA2, mCRPC_8m_adrs_IA2)

# Mirror the same filters for ADSL and ADTR
Nsq_NSCLC_adsl_IA2 <- ia2_adsl %>% filter(grepl("NON-SMALL CELL LUNG CANCER", PRTUMTY),
                                            STUDYESC == "Nsq. NSCLC GSK5764227 8 mg/kg") %>%
  mutate(indication_dose = "Nsq_NSCLC_8mg")
HNSCC_adsl_IA2 <- ia2_adsl %>% filter(STUDYESC == "HNSCC GSK5764227 8 mg/kg") %>%
  mutate(indication_dose = "HNSCC_8mg")
ES_SCLC_6mg_adsl_IA1 <- ia1_adsl %>% filter(COHORT == "ES-SCLC COHORT",
                                              TRT01A == "GSK227 6 mg/kg Q3W Dose Opt",
                                              MITTFL == "Y") %>%
  mutate(indication_dose = "ES_SCLC_6mg")
ES_SCLC_8mg_adsl_IA1 <- ia1_adsl %>% filter(COHORT == "ES-SCLC COHORT",
                                              TRT01A == "GSK227 8 mg/kg Q3W Dose Opt",
                                              MITTFL == "Y") %>%
  mutate(indication_dose = "ES_SCLC_8mg")
mCRPC_6m_adsl_IA2 <- ia2_adsl %>% filter(COHORT == "MCRPC COHORT", MORRSFL == "Y",
                                            TRT01A == "GSK227 6 mg/kg Q3W Dose Opt") %>%
  mutate(indication_dose = "mCRPC_6mg")
mCRPC_8m_adsl_IA2 <- ia2_adsl %>% filter(COHORT == "MCRPC COHORT", MORRSFL == "Y",
                                            TRT01A == "GSK227 8 mg/kg Q3W Dose Opt") %>%
  mutate(indication_dose = "mCRPC_8mg")
pan_adsl <- rbind(Nsq_NSCLC_adsl_IA2, HNSCC_adsl_IA2,
                   ES_SCLC_6mg_adsl_IA1, ES_SCLC_8mg_adsl_IA1,
                   mCRPC_6m_adsl_IA2, mCRPC_8m_adsl_IA2)

# ADTR mirrors the same logic
Nsq_NSCLC_adtr_IA2 <- ia2_adtr %>% filter(PARAM == "Best Confirmed Response by Investigator (RECIST 1.1)",
                                            grepl("NON-SMALL CELL LUNG CANCER", PRTUMTY),
                                            STUDYESC == "Nsq. NSCLC GSK5764227 8 mg/kg") %>%
  mutate(indication_dose = "Nsq_NSCLC_8mg")
HNSCC_adtr_IA2 <- ia2_adtr %>% filter(PARAM == "Best Confirmed Response by Investigator (RECIST 1.1)",
                                        STUDYESC == "HNSCC GSK5764227 8 mg/kg") %>%
  mutate(indication_dose = "HNSCC_8mg")
ES_SCLC_6mg_adtr_IA1 <- ia1_adtr %>% filter(PARAM == "Best Confirmed Response by Investigator (RECIST 1.1)",
                                              COHORT == "ES-SCLC COHORT",
                                              TRT01A == "GSK227 6 mg/kg Q3W Dose Opt",
                                              MITTFL == "Y") %>%
  mutate(indication_dose = "ES_SCLC_6mg")
ES_SCLC_8mg_adtr_IA1 <- ia1_adtr %>% filter(PARAM == "Best Confirmed Response by Investigator (RECIST 1.1)",
                                              COHORT == "ES-SCLC COHORT",
                                              TRT01A == "GSK227 8 mg/kg Q3W Dose Opt",
                                              MITTFL == "Y") %>%
  mutate(indication_dose = "ES_SCLC_8mg")
mCRPC_6m_adtr_IA2 <- ia2_adtr %>% filter(PARAM == "Best Confirmed Response by Investigator (Modified RECIST 1.1)",
                                           COHORT == "MCRPC COHORT", MORRSFL == "Y",
                                           TRT01A == "GSK227 6 mg/kg Q3W Dose Opt") %>%
  mutate(indication_dose = "mCRPC_6mg")
mCRPC_8m_adtr_IA2 <- ia2_adtr %>% filter(PARAM == "Best Confirmed Response by Investigator (Modified RECIST 1.1)",
                                           COHORT == "MCRPC COHORT", MORRSFL == "Y",
                                           TRT01A == "GSK227 8 mg/kg Q3W Dose Opt") %>%
  mutate(indication_dose = "mCRPC_8mg")
pan_adtr <- rbind(Nsq_NSCLC_adtr_IA2, HNSCC_adtr_IA2,
                   ES_SCLC_6mg_adtr_IA1, ES_SCLC_8mg_adtr_IA1,
                   mCRPC_6m_adtr_IA2, mCRPC_8m_adtr_IA2)
```

### GH Infinity ctDNA Loading

```{r load_ctdna}
base_dir <- "/mnt/data/61602_223054_BIOMARK_EXPLORATORY_04_UNB_ANALYSIS/inputdata/Guardant Health_ctDNA/Production/"

file_list <- dir_ls(path = base_dir, recurse = TRUE,
                     regexp = "(InfinityReport|CoreReport)\\.csv$")
# Excluded files (per QC discussion with vendor)
file_list <- file_list[!file_list %in% c(
  paste0(base_dir, "Batch03_25FEB2026/20260224_GSK_SOW36_71Samples_InfinityReport.csv"),
  paste0(base_dir, "Batch02_15JAN2026/20260109_GSK_SOW36_85Samples_InfinityReport.csv"),
  paste0(base_dir, "Batch01_14NOV2025/20251114_GSK_SOW36_34Samples_CoreReport.csv")
)]

read_custom_data <- function(path) {
  first_line <- readLines(path, n = 1)
  delim_used <- if (grepl("\t", first_line)) "\t" else ","
  read_delim(path, delim = delim_used,
             col_types = cols(.default = "c"), show_col_types = FALSE)
}

final_df0 <- file_list %>%
  map(read_custom_data) %>%
  list_rbind() %>%
  mutate(Patient_ID = str_pad(Patient_ID, width = 6, side = "left", pad = "0")) %>%
  type_convert()
```

### ctdnaTM Prep (v0.75.10 list shape)

```{r prep}
# v0.75.10 returns a LIST with $ctdna, $variants, $samples, $clinical, $tmb
prep <- ctdna_prepare(infinity_report = final_df0,
                      clinical        = pan_adrs)

prep <- ctdna_qc_filter(prep,
                        sample_status = NULL,   # e.g. "PASS"
                        plasma_min    = 0,
                        dna_ng_min    = 0,
                        verbose       = TRUE)

nrow(prep$ctdna)
```

### Plots

```{r plots}
# All plots take prep$ctdna (v0.75.10 list-shape)
ctdna_plot_baseline(prep$ctdna)
ctdna_plot_baseline_dose_recist(prep$ctdna)
ctdna_plot_oncoprint(prep$ctdna)
# ... etc.
```
